name: Known Networks of the North
author: Unknown
description:
A trader's map in prose — overland routes, river links, and smuggling paths through the Evermoors that official caravans pretend not to know.

The thirteenth-century original is updated in margins by generations of merchants; some notes are in cipher, some in blood.

name: Kandlekeep Dekonstruktion
author: Isajar
description:
Kandlekeep Dekonstruktion — A chronicle preserved in northern and coastal scriptoria — dates, names, and the sort of detail merchants pretend not to need. Isajar is credited in library catalogues; the work is dated to before 1492 DR.

Later hands added marginal dates and crossed out names; historians still argue which revisions were propaganda.
